articles.title: Bitcoin Taking Out $20,000 Puts Solana, Polygon, XRP On The Cusp Of Huge Price Explosions
articles.description: Bitcoin is back above $20,000, days after breaking a two-month-long ranging-market spell and printing a string of green daily candles.

articles.title: Solana Re-enters Top 10 Digital Asset With Impressive 135% Rally
articles.description: Solana flipped Polygon to be the 10th largest crypto asset by market cap, following a seven-day rally that saw it rise by over 70%.

articles.title: Cardano Developers Reveal Critical New Toolkit for Ethereum-Compatible Sidechains
articles.description: Input Output Global (IOG), the development team behind Ethereum (ETH) rival Cardano (ADA), is announcing the launch of a new toolkit that allows for the building of sidechains for the Cardano network. In a blog post, IOG says that the toolkit enables developers to build Ethereum virtual machine (EVM)-compatible chains with their own consensus algorithm […]

articles.title: Bitcoin fails to convince that bottom is in with $12K ‘still likely’
articles.description: BTC price optimism is limited at best after multi-month highs, with Bitcoin traders fearing a reversion to macro lows.

articles.title: Cardano Beats Dogecoin (DOGE) in Market Cap Top as ADA Price Spikes Higher
articles.description: Cardano finally reclaims its market cap top spot from DOGE

articles.title: Polygon Announces Proposed Hardfork To Improve Chain Performance
articles.description: Leading Ethereum scaling solution Polygon has unveiled its plans to implement a hardfork on its PoS chain on Jan 17, 2023. According to a tweet on Jan. 12, Polygon stated the proposed hardfork is “good news” for developers and users alike, as it will help create a “better” user experience. Via a blog post on […]
